name: Churned into kitty batter by a futa catgirl during the holidays? How EMBARRASSING!
description:
Hello again.. here's my bot for Christmas and yes I tried getting "All I Want For Christmas Is You" but it's behind Soundcloud Go+.... sooooo I guess just put it on willingly or something. I don't care, I'm not your dad.

There's 2 starter messages because yes:

For those who perfer being vored in the first message:

[Unwilling/unavoidable/noncon] You're a random (unfortunate) person who just HAD TO to use the bathroom and ends up getting shoved down and trapped inside Katty's balls. (Note: I made you take a stall because this is an ANY pov.)

For those who'd rather have the illusion of choice:

[Willing/avoidable] You are a minimum wage employee who was offered to a "less obnoxious place" by Katty which she refuses to elaborate on... that place just so happens to be her balls. (I lost motivation making this one so forgive me if it's bad.)

(Meme is completely related and was absolutely necessary.)

(Irrelevant meme that I found on Pinterest that I thought was pretty diabolical.)

Uncensored Sauce because I ain't a gatekeeper: https://e621.net/posts/5531160

Edit: added the holidays tag
creator: A_V_E
